name: NorZinc Ltd.
summary: NorZinc Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of natural resource properties in Canada. The company's principal project is the Prairie Creek mine, a zinc-lead-silver property located in the Northwest Territories. It also holds four high-grade zinc-lead-copper-gold-silver volcanogenic massive sulphide deposits consisting of Lemarchant, Boomerang-Domino, Long Lake, and Tulks East properties. The company formerly known as Canadian Zinc Corporation and changed its name to NorZinc Ltd. in September 2018. NorZinc Ltd. was incorporated in 1965 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
